meanings.definition: the fourth book of the Old Testament; contains a record of the number of Israelites who followed Moses out of Egypt
the property possessed by a sum or total or indefinite quantity of units or individuals
examples: he had a number of chores to do
the number of parameters is small
the figure was about a thousand

meanings.definition: a concept of quantity involving zero and units
examples: every number has a unique position in the sequence

meanings.definition: a short theatrical performance that is part of a longer program
examples: he did his act three times every evening
she had a catchy little routine
it was one of the best numbers he ever did

meanings.definition: the number is used in calling a particular telephone
examples: he has an unlisted number

meanings.definition: a symbol used to represent a number
examples: he learned to write the numerals before he went to school

meanings.definition: one of a series published periodically
examples: she found an old issue of the magazine in her dentist's waiting room
I hope to become one of their number before I die

meanings.definition: a numeral or string of numerals that is used for identification
examples: she refused to give them her Social Security number
a number 13 shoe

meanings.definition: the grammatical category for the forms of nouns and pronouns and verbs that are used depending on the number of entities involved (singular or dual or plural)
examples: in English the subject and the verb must agree in number

meanings.definition: an item of merchandise offered for sale
examples: she preferred the black nylon number
this sweater is an all-wool number

meanings.definition: add up in number or quantity
examples: The bills amounted to $2,000
The bill came to $2,000
You should number the pages of the thesis
We must number the names of the great mathematicians
The academy counts several Nobel Prize winners among its members

meanings.definition: determine the number or amount of
examples: Can you count the books on your shelf?
Count your change

meanings.definition: place a limit on the number of
